◎简　　介  

　　After their tumultuous time last series, Louisa has gone for a break to visit her mother in Spain and to have some time to think, and get some perspective on their relationship.  Martin is faced with the questions: will Louisa come back to him; and what can he do to make sure that she does?Martin knows that he needs to change for the sake of his marriage, and seeks out a ther...
